schemes.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
schemes.benefit: ₹6,000 per year, paid in 3 installments of ₹2,000 directly to bank account
schemes.description: Direct income support for small and marginal farmer families to help with agricultural and household expenses.
schemes.why_template: You own {land_size_acres} acres of farmland (within the ~5 acre / 2 hectare limit for small & marginal farmers) and have an Aadhaar-linked bank account.
schemes.almost_eligible_hint: If you don't yet have an Aadhaar-linked bank account, this is the main step needed to apply.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat – PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
schemes.hindi_name: आयुष्मान भारत – प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
schemes.benefit: Up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for cashless hospital treatment at empanelled hospitals
schemes.description: Free health insurance cover for economically vulnerable families and all senior citizens aged 70+.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
schemes.benefit: Financial assistance (typically ₹1.2–1.3 lakh in rural areas) to build a pucca house
schemes.description: Helps families living in kucha (mud/thatch) houses build a permanent pucca house.
schemes.why_template: You currently live in a kucha house and your household income is below ₹15,000/month, which matches PMAY's target group.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000 after age 60, based on contribution amount
schemes.description: A pension scheme for workers in the unorganised sector with no formal employer pension.
schemes.why_template: You are {age} years old, work in the informal sector, and have a bank account — APY is designed exactly for workers like you who don't have an employer pension.
schemes.almost_eligible_hint: APY enrollment is only open between ages 18-40 — if you're outside this range, this scheme won't apply, but PM-SYM may have alternatives.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
schemes.benefit: Free LPG gas connection (with deposit-free cylinder) for eligible women-headed households
schemes.description: Provides clean cooking fuel access to low-income households, registered in the woman's name.
schemes.why_template: As a woman applicant from a household with income below ₹10,000/month and no existing LPG connection, you qualify for a free Ujjwala connection.
